# Test Data for Markdown Preview CLI

This directory contains test documents for verifying the Markdown and HTML preview functionality.

## Directory Structure

| Directory | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `.` (root) | Core Markdown syntax tests |
| `japanese/` | Japanese language documents |
| `edge-cases/` | Edge cases and stress tests |
| `html/` | HTML file preview tests |
| `html/edge-cases/` | HTML edge cases (minimal, no-doctype, fragment, special chars) |
| `nested/deep/structure/` | Deeply nested directory structure |

## Documents

1. [Headings](./01-headings.md) - All heading levels
2. [Text Formatting](./02-text-formatting.md) - Inline formatting
3. [Lists](./03-lists.md) - All list types
4. [Links & Images](./04-links-and-images.md) - Links, images, references
5. [Code](./05-code.md) - Code blocks and syntax highlighting
6. [Tables](./06-tables.md) - Table variations
7. [Blockquotes](./07-blockquotes.md) - Blockquotes and nesting
8. [Horizontal Rules](./08-horizontal-rules.md) - Thematic breaks
9. [Inline HTML](./09-html-inline.md) - Raw HTML in Markdown
10. [Math](./10-math.md) - Mathematical expressions
11. [Footnotes & Extensions](./11-footnotes.md) - Extended syntax
